channel.title: 3D Printing on Home Smart Mesh
channel.description: Recent content in 3D Printing on Home Smart Mesh

item.title: Switch Cover
item.description: Cover Dumb Switch with Smart Switch # Download STL 01 black and white 3dprints 02 black and white breakout 03 black and white back side

item.title: Switch Socket Cover
item.description: Cover Dumb Switch and smart Socket # Download STL Application # More details on the raspberry pi service

item.title: ESP32 remote
item.description: ESP32 Case for up/down remote control # Download STL models zip Application # More details on the ESP32 Arduino code 3D printing creation requires sometimes quite a number of iterations

item.title: Voronoi Shapes
